name: Lemon Torte
recipeIngredient: 5-1/2 oz package, finely crushed Pepperidge Farm Lemon Crunch cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed cookies with melted butter. Pat the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Refrigerate.
2. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
3. In another bowl, beat yolks until thick and lemon-colored. Stir in lemon juice and peel.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the yolk mixture. Fold in whipped cream.
5. Pour the filling into the crust. Freeze.
6. Puree thawed frozen raspberries. Pour through a strainer into a serving bowl.
7. Let the torte stand at room temperature for 10 minutes. Remove the springform and slice. Serve with raspberry sauce.
